description: Easily snooze tabs with a click! Set timers to hide distracting tabs and automatically bring them back when you need them again.
name: Tab Snoozer - Snooze tabs in a click
author: Rusty

snooze-1hour.description: Snooze the current tab for 1 hour

snooze-tomorrow-morning.description: Snooze the current tab until tomorrow morning (9 AM)

snooze-weekend-or-monday.description: Snooze the current tab until Saturday or Monday morning

snooze-one-month.description: Snooze the current tab for one month
